subcodes.first_line: Praise be to the Lord of the Kingdom, Who hath illumined the world with the lights of His Most Great Name and raised the pavilion of "Verily, I am." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مالک ملکوت را که بانوار اسم اعظم عالم را منور فرمود و سرادق اننی انا
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
